abilities.description: When you @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.f4dec946415d8e57]{Aid Your Ally}, add +1 and take +1 momentum on a hit. This is in addition to the benefits taken by your ally. On a strong hit with a match, envision how this moment marks a breakthrough or milestone in your relationship; both of you may mark 1 tick on your bonds legacy track.
When an ally make the @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.ff32c523829d6481]{Endure Stress} move in your company, they add +1 and you take +1 momentum on a hit.

When you stand with your ally as they make a progress move, envision how you support them. Then, roll one challenge die. On a 1-9, your ally may replace one of their challenge dice with yours. On a 10, envision how you inadvertently undermine their action; your ally must replace their lowest challenge die with yours.
